prompt: Create a vertical full-body anime concept-art illustration of exactly one young male character, a stern teenage soldier, standing front-facing with a slight relaxed slouch on an off-white blank studio background. Preserve a serious, unimpressed expression, short light-blond curly hair mostly covered by a fluffy beige ushanka-style winter hat, pale skin, slim youthful proportions, and large black over-ear tactical headphones. Redesign only the outfit as a modern military field uniform: green-and-brown woodland camouflage jacket and loose cargo pants tucked into black lace-up combat boots, a tan tactical plate carrier with many pouches across the chest and abdomen, tan shoulder straps, a side satchel or backpack visible behind the right arm, a green scarf or neck wrap, and a red-and-yellow sleeve patch on the upper right arm. Add one long black radio antenna rising vertically behind the shoulder and one black assault rifle hanging downward at the character’s left side, held loosely by a strap; do not show the weapon aimed or in use. Include exactly one outfit and exactly one character, no lineup, no collage, no alternate versions. On the left side of the image, add a small block of Japanese-style annotation text with a bold heading and four short lines beneath it, partially cropped and slightly nonsensical, like a character design sheet note. Use expressive sketchy ink outlines, muted watercolor/marker coloring, visible rough construction strokes, subtle shadows under the boots, and a clean manga character-design-sheet aesthetic. The outfit color theme is olive green, dark forest green, tan, and brown; the sleeve patch should feature red and yellow.
promptEn: Create a vertical full-body anime concept-art illustration of exactly one young male character, a stern teenage soldier, standing front-facing with a slight relaxed slouch on an off-white blank studio background. Preserve a serious, unimpressed expression, short light-blond curly hair mostly covered by a fluffy beige ushanka-style winter hat, pale skin, slim youthful proportions, and large black over-ear tactical headphones. Redesign only the outfit as a modern military field uniform: green-and-brown woodland camouflage jacket and loose cargo pants tucked into black lace-up combat boots, a tan tactical plate carrier with many pouches across the chest and abdomen, tan shoulder straps, a side satchel or backpack visible behind the right arm, a green scarf or neck wrap, and a red-and-yellow sleeve patch on the upper right arm. Add one long black radio antenna rising vertically behind the shoulder and one black assault rifle hanging downward at the character’s left side, held loosely by a strap; do not show the weapon aimed or in use. Include exactly one outfit and exactly one character, no lineup, no collage, no alternate versions. On the left side of the image, add a small block of Japanese-style annotation text with a bold heading and four short lines beneath it, partially cropped and slightly nonsensical, like a character design sheet note. Use expressive sketchy ink outlines, muted watercolor/marker coloring, visible rough construction strokes, subtle shadows under the boots, and a clean manga character-design-sheet aesthetic. The outfit color theme is olive green, dark forest green, tan, and brown; the sleeve patch should feature red and yellow.
promptZh: 创作一张垂直的全身动漫概念艺术插图，仅包含一名年轻男性角色，一名严肃的少年士兵，正面站立，身体略微放松，背景为灰白色的空白摄影棚背景。保持严肃、冷漠的表情，留着浅金色短卷发，大部分被一顶蓬松的米色雷锋帽遮住，皮肤白皙，身材苗条年轻，佩戴大型黑色耳罩式战术耳机。仅重新设计服装为现代军事野战制服：绿色和棕色的林地迷彩夹克，宽松的工装裤塞进黑色系带作战靴中，胸部和腹部配有带多个口袋的棕褐色战术防弹背心，棕褐色肩带，右臂后方可见一个侧挎包或背包，围着绿色围巾或颈饰，右上臂贴有红黄色的袖章。在肩膀后方垂直增加一根长长的黑色无线电天线，左侧悬挂一把黑色突击步枪，由带子松散地固定；不要展示武器瞄准或使用中的状态。仅包含一套服装和一个角色，不要拼图、不要拼贴、不要其他版本。在图像左侧，添加一小块日式注释文本，包含一个粗体标题和下方四行简短文字，部分裁剪且略显无意义，类似于角色设计页的备注。使用富有表现力的草图墨水轮廓、柔和的水彩/马克笔上色、可见的粗糙构图笔触、靴子下方微妙的阴影，以及简洁的漫画角色设计页美学。服装配色方案为 橄榄绿、深森林绿、棕褐色和棕色；袖章应采用 红色和黄色。
